releaseNotesMarkdown:
## What's new in this update

### Forge Sync improvements

_No commits since last build._

### Forge Tools improvements

- Peer(trickster): extract inline DispatcherTimer lambdas in ForgeFloatingStatus to named delegates — prevents GC collection on .NET 8
- Patrol(charm): Added placeholder TextBlock with DataTrigger to SheetSearchBox in RevisionForgeWindow
- Elder(hearthwyrm): fix SheetSearchPlaceholder Grid.Column placement in RevisionForgeWindow
- Forge(dewscale): polished SuccessPulse easing from SineEase to CubicEase in ForgeFloatingStatus
- Patrol(bellows): SelectCommandsWindow — text ellipsis + MinWidth/MinHeight for responsive sizing
- Peer(pathfinder): fix RepeatBehavior=Forever+DropShadowEffect perf hazard on Add button glow
- Forgemaster: update comment to reflect RepeatBehavior=5x (was Forever)
- Patrol(luxesmith): created ForgeListBoxStyle and ForgeListBoxItemStyle in LuxeComponents.xaml
- Merge: resolve conflict with dev-patrol — keep both _revertTimerTickHandler and _milestoneEchoTimer fields
- Merge: resolve conflict with dev-patrol — keep ForgeListBox styles + LuxeSection from upstream
- Patrol(noxshade): remove dead field PlotForgeWindow._runnerGravity — initialized but never read; game loop uses GravityPerSec constant instead
- Forge(quickforge): optimized ForgeFloatingStatus timer/GC performance
- Forge(questwright): add companion ability system — 10 passive abilities unlocked through bond progression
- Patrol(ashbane): atomic replace in SpotlightStateStore.Save — no data loss if Move throws
- Peer(hammersmith): fix companion ability level 1 never unlocks for new profiles
- Merge: resolve conflict with dev-patrol — adopt _waveTimerTickHandler field pattern from upstream
- Forgemaster: fix bond level 1 milestone counter (shown=0 not 1)
- Forge(mythscribe): add ASCII stat level-up ceremony before marquee in BarForge
- Peer(trickster): guard _isClosed in DrainStatLevelUpQueue to prevent post-close zombie events
- Patrol(grimtally): atomic write for BarForge profile export via temp-then-rename
- Patrol(slagfist): fix CS4014 unawaited async calls in 3 files
- Peer(noxwyrm): KeyForgeWindow - revert to sync Action; async lambda CS4014 suppression fails on net48 WPF tmp projects
- Patrol(warpstar): Add Warp Star easter egg to RangeSelectorWindow
- Elder(ashwyrm): KeyForgeWindow - revert to plain sync Action; fix AboutWindow ConfigureAwait(false)
- Peer(chaosmaw): call StopWarpStar() in OnClosing to prevent timer leaks on window close
- Patrol(compassforge): upgraded XcelForgeSettings -1 sentinel to NaN for window position, fixing secondary monitor placements
- Peer(lockjaw): fix Gimbal sentinel check to use NaN-aware guard
- Forge(pixelwright): Add TileBreaker breakout game to FilterCraftWindow
- Resolve build error (attempt 1)
- Patrol(anvil): extract RetryScope to consolidate linear-backoff retry logic in NomadFileSystem
- Peer(hammersmith): wire TileBreaker mouse events and fix event unsubscribe leaks
- Elder(ashwyrm): remove unused RetryScope.Execute dead code
- Elder(ashwyrm): remove unused RetryScope.Context field and constructor param
- Elder(cruciwyrm): add ReduceMotion guard + DropShadowEffect cleanup to TileBreaker
- Forge(juicesmith): pooled float+fade feedback popups for RuneTap
- Patrol(scribe): document AnnotationSuppressionScope with tier-cascade architecture explainer
- Forge(flareveil): add button micro-interactions and success flash to CheckListWindow
- Peer(stormwing): remove dead FlareButtonStyle and EmptyStateBreathe — both unused and lack ReduceMotion guard
- Elder(hearthwyrm): stop OkSuccessFlash storyboard in OnClosing to prevent leaked animation
- Forge(goldleaf): elevated FittingForgeWindow close button to ChromeCloseButton style
- Peer(prismsight): add AutomationProperties.Name to FittingForge close button for WCAG compliance
- Forge(whispercharm): remember SearchInKeys and CaseInsensitive checkbox state in FindReplaceDialog
- Patrol(barsmith): add search position indicator (3 of N) for keyboard navigation
- Forge(crierforge): migrated corrupt-file TaskDialog to ForgeToast in ViewportPositionListManagerWindow
- Patrol(sumsmith): extract inline timer lambdas to stored delegates in AnnounceIntensityTierTransition/AnnounceIntensityTierCooldown for .NET 8 GC safety
- Peer(hammersmith): fix inverted guard in TierTransitionFade_Tick
- Patrol(emberclad): cache score popup animations in VoidDrifter to eliminate per-spawn allocation
- Patrol(torchbearer): add interactive guide overlay to SelectCommandsWindow
- Peer(herald): add missing CHANGELOG entry for SelectCommands Interactive Guide
- Patrol(forgeheart): remove BitmapCache from MoodBorder in ForgeFloatingStatus
- Forge(wayfinder): fix contextual tip triggers to use DisplayNames
- Patrol(glimmerscale): enhanced Void Drifter particle system with color-varied exhaust, explosion, and bullet trail effects
- Forge(revelwright): wire sheet export milestone ceremonies in BarForgeWindow
- Elder(cruciwyrm): unsubscribe OnSheetExportMilestone in OnClosed — closes static event leak
- Patrol(pillwright): add Idle Flourish — 80s gold glow pulse on BarForge pill when idle and lonely
- Patrol(loretome): add 1.0.30 and 1.0.31 to patch_notes.json; bump AssemblyVersion to 1.0.31
- Patrol(lorespell): fix stale modifier count and Mermaid label in two docs
- Forge(tempestforge): added PressureWaveModifier — shockwave pulses from grid center every 20s, pushing tiles outward
- Patrol(runeweave): rename CombineLevelAndLocation to FormatLevelAndLocation in ListPanelSchedulesWindow
- Elder(cruciwyrm): fix PressureWaveModifier target direction — was pushing tiles inward toward center instead of outward
- Patrol(hearthwind): add FilterCraft icon+guidance; add MimicForge DisplayName+Tooltip
- Patrol(oraclevein): add COUNCIL CHRONICLES tab and CouncilVitals system
- Peer(tallyscale): unsubscribe OnPatrolRecorded in OnClosed to prevent leak
- Forge(routesmith): add confidence metadata to workflow chain and pair entries
- Forgemaster: fix CouncilChronicleConverter ConverterParameter for clean rate bar
- Patrol(exportguard): added out Exception lastException overload to FileIOHelper.RetryIO
- Forge(tidecaller): Added get_schedule_insights MCP tool to forge-memory for aggregate scheduling intelligence
- Elder(chronowyrm): remove dead-code accumulators from get_schedule_insights
- Forge(moltenbeard-creator): Added Quick Draw burst session achievements
- Patrol(ironvow): strip '..' sequences in Sentinel.SanitizeFileName to prevent path traversal
- Patrol(slagbeard-creator): replaced inline DispatcherTimer lambdas with named handlers and added Forge Explorer achievement system
- Patrol(steelward): create CommandExecutor utility and apply to AlignAnnotationsCommand
- Forge(forgewyrm-creator): add Companion Greeting Framework for personalized welcome messages
- Peer(chaosmaw): remove dead code DayCheck() and GetTimePrefix() from CompanionReactions
- Forge(plumbersmith-creator): Created StreakCelebrationEngine + fixed IdeaSmithWindow RepeatBehavior+DropShadowEffect cleanup
- Elder(cruciwyrm): wire StreakCelebrationEngine into IdeaSmithCommand — RecordSuccess/RecordFailure had zero call sites
- Patrol(preflightguard): add TryPreflight at top of ProjectInfoForgeCommand.Execute()
- Patrol(sumsmith-creator): remove dead field _hudCloseBtn in QuickFilterGame
- Patrol(aegis): fix NullReferenceException in view?.ViewType.ToString() null-guard bugs
- Forge(glimmerscale-creator): add GlyphParticleEmitter — reusable FA glyph particle framework with cursor attraction/repulsion physics
- Peer(chaosmaw): fix ReduceMotion CPU dormancy — stop timer loop after SpawnAllInstant
- Patrol(swiftblade): optimized OpenPanelFromSelectionCommand panel schedule lookup - single-pass O(n) instead of two sequential O(n) Full scan
- Elder(ironwyrm): honor RTMRunHelper command outcomes
- Forgemaster: preserve ID-match priority regardless of collection iteration order
- Patrol(arcadesmith-creator): integrate ArcadeScoreTracker into LogicSweeperGame for persistent scoring
- Peer(anvilwyrm): call UpdateScoreText() in Start() to sync UI after tracker reset
- Patrol(cinderbloom): unsubscribe Closing and Loaded events in FilterForgeWindow OnClosed
- Peer(prismsight): add AutomationProperties.Name to icon-only window control buttons for WCAG 2.1 AA screen reader compliance
- Patrol(embersong): added WhereElementIsNotElementType quick filter to 7 collectors across 5 files
- Forge(sparkweave-creator): created ForgeSpinner — shared loading spinner utility in RTMTools.UI
- Peer(stormwing): fix ForgeSpinner Show() never added icon to visual tree
- Elder(hearthwyrm): Fix Border spinner leak — add border.Child=null in Hide()
- Patrol(sparkweave): added SmoothCollapseStyle to CornerPickerWindow guide panel
- Forge(compassforge-creator): compute ConfidenceScore/Tier for workflow chains, add recency weighting to suggestions
- Peer(prismsight): add AutomationProperties.Name to GuideToggle and ReduceMotion guard to SmoothCollapseStyle
- Forgemaster: initialize ConfidenceScore=100 and ConfidenceTier=4 on brand-new ChainEntry
- Patrol(foundry): fix ForgeMetrics_Init BeforeTargets to use Build instead of non-existent BeforeBuild/CoreBuild
- Patrol(switchyard): ToggleNoPlotNPTagsCommand.Run() uses ContextGuard.IsProjectDocument() for family+linked guard
- Patrol(threadguard): remove nested Dispatcher.Invoke from background Task.Run in IdeaSmithViewModel.LoadToolsAsync
- Patrol(moltenbeard-creator): fix malformed if-block in ArcadeManager.Unlock() — EnsureAchievement/streak calls now execute only on successful unlock
- Forge(plumbersmith-creator): Add CompletionCeremonyEngine for configurable multi-step celebration sequences
- Patrol(steelward): add top-level exception handler to CopyCDFamiliesFromLinkCommand.Execute()
- Patrol(preflightguard): add TryPreflight to AlignAnnotationsCommand.Execute
- Patrol(ironhelm): add [RTMCommand(IsIgnored=true)] to AddElectricalConnectorCommand
- Patrol(sumsmith-creator): remove dead _hudCloseBtn field in QuickFilterGame
- Elder(cruciwyrm): preserve completion feedback when easter eggs are off
- Forge(glimmerscale-creator): fix EmberField particle visual leak
- Patrol(swiftblade): remove dead endIndex variable in CreateDuctHorizontalElbowRightCommand
- Forge(barsmith-creator): enhanced BarForge search UX with actionable empty state and compact mode shortcut hints
- Patrol(embersong): add WhereElementIsNotElementType quick filter to CopyMonitorLevelsGridsCommand
- Forge(luxesmith-creator): Created LuxeCard reusable card component with 6 attached properties
- Patrol(emberveil): apply ForgeTextBoxStyle to KeynoteSnippetDialog TextBoxes
- Forge(sparkweave-creator): created ForgeStagger — staggered child animation system in RTMTools.UI
- Elder(hearthwyrm): fix SlideDown/SlideUp direction swap in ForgeStagger
- Forge(compassforge-creator): activate dormant confidence scoring in workflow intelligence engines
- Integrate dev-patrol safely
- Merge safe dev-patrol integration
- Merge dev-patrol into forge/oraclevein (resolve ArcadeManager.cs)
- Merge dev-patrol into forge/compassforge-creator (resolve WorkflowChain + BarForge)
- Merge dev-patrol into forge/warpstar (resolve DuplicateForgeWindow cleanup)
- Merge dev-patrol into main
- Resolve PR 720 safely
- Resolve PR 720 safely
- Resolve PR 720 safely
- Resolve PR 720 safely
- Merge dev-patrol into main (2026-04-20)
- Merge main into dev-patrol (prefer dev-patrol on conflicts)
- Restore ComputeRecencyWeight method name in WorkflowChainService

_(+ 122 internal/noise commit(s) hidden)_

_(comparing only the most recent 250 commits — see GitHub for the full diff)_

### Plugin improvements

_No commits since last build._
